name: ROAI AI-Native Workshop Tool
description: Executive workshop tool: a knowledge base grounds AI-generated, boardroom-level challenges per group and simulated C-level board feedback; facilitators run their group through an initial answer, board challenge, revised answer, and 30/60/90-day actions; admin gets a live progress board, a selective plenary presentation view, and a closing report per group.
majorCapabilities: AI-Generated Challenges Grounded in Survey Data + Knowledge Base
Simulated C-level Board Feedback Grounded in the Knowledge Base
Live Group Progress Board for Admins
